texto: Core values serve as a lighthouse when the fog of life seems to leave you wandering in circles
autor: when you encounter that moment where every decision is a tough one and no choice seems to clearly be the better choice.
explicacao: Citação de when you encounter that moment where every decision is a tough one and no choice seems to clearly be the better choice. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Core values serve as a lighthouse when the fog of life seems to leave you wandering in circles” articula reflexao, j-loren-norris, values em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
